RuleSet.Name: libschema/schema/SchemaSchemaPool.hpp
RuleSet.Descr: C++18 specification of a $SchemaName$ schema pool.
RuleSet.GenRule: #include <$lower reference RefSchema SchemaName$/I$reference RefSchema SchemaName$Schema.hpp> #include <$lower reference RefSchema SchemaName$/$reference RefSchema SchemaName$Schema.hpp>
$iterate SchemaRefs( first derefDeclSchemaSchemaPoolMembers each empty empty empty )$
$iterate SchemaRefs( empty declConfigurationFileConf first empty each empty )$$iterate SchemaRefs( first empty each empty empty declConfigurationFileInstances )$
std::list<$reference RefSchema CPlusNamespace$::I$reference RefSchema SchemaName$Schema*>* instances;
std::string* jndiName; $reference RefSchema CPlusNamespace$::$reference RefSchema SchemaName$ConfigurationFile* configFile;
std::string* jndiName; $popto SchemaDef CPlusNamespace$::$popto SchemaDef SchemaName$ConfigurationFile* configFile;
virtual void setConfigurationFile( $reference RefSchema CPlusNamespace$::$reference RefSchema SchemaName$ConfigurationFile* value );
virtual const std::string* getJndiName(); virtual void setJndiName( const std::string* value );
$iterate SchemaRefs( first reallyDeclSchemaPoolToBeOverloaded each empty empty reallyDeclSchemaSchemaPoolToBeOverloaded )$
